title: CTOV - Farmer Delight Compat
description: Compatibility add-on for Farmer's delight mod and CTOV
body:
# No longer needed for Minecraft 1.20 or later
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Farmer's Delight. You will find some crops on farms using Farmer Delight's crops as well. 1.18-1.19 datapack is for both Forge and Fabric. 

**Farmer's Delight mod**

Farmer's Delight mod for forge can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

Farmer's Delight mod for fabric can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
